title: Batman/Gotham 9-tier archive; canon hierarchy + Azrael rule + Issue #1-2 proofs
public_claim: Batman/Gotham 9-tier archive; canon hierarchy + Azrael rule + Issue #1-2 proofs is a preserved project packet for the current lossless replacement handoff archive for the user's long-form Batman/Gotham story project — a serial comic structured around an anti-hopelessness moral constitution ("trauma != destiny; appearance != morality; redemption != death"), a White Rose / Winter-Thaw-Fire season.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is creative-system governance: preserve the manuscript, room, or narrative apparatus while distinguishing public concept, internal drafting machinery, and work not yet ready for external presentation.
use_value: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.
